title: stelis majuscula
intro: Stelis majuscula is a species of orchid plant, specifically a type of epiphyte that grows in the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Stelis majuscula include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in traditional medicine. The health benefits of this plant are said to include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Stelis majuscula can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
